hyperedges.label: Scheduled scrape-and-commit workflow pattern
hyperedges.rationale: All auto-update workflows share the same scaffold: cron schedule + workflow_dispatch, contents:write permission, checkout + setup-node@20, run a scripts/update-*.js scraper, then commit-and-push only if data/ changed.

hyperedges.label: Cross-game Missables Checklist tool pattern (on-device ticks)

nodes.label: Update Dreamlight Valley Data
nodes.rationale: Runs weekly on Monday because the Star Path reveals weekly; rebuilds furniture, clothing, animals, items, recipes and starpath datasets (recipes run after items.json).

nodes.label: Update Demonologist Data
nodes.rationale: Weekly scrape of Demonologist demons, evidence and tools into data/demonologist.

nodes.label: Update Warframe Drop Table
nodes.rationale: Weekly rebuild of data/warframe drop table.

nodes.label: Update Far Far West Builds
nodes.rationale: Runs daily because community build votes shift; scrapes top-rated loadouts from wikily.gg into data/far-far-west/builds.json.

nodes.label: Update Far Far West Maps
nodes.rationale: Weekly scrape of region collectible/secret map data from wikily.gg into data/far-far-west/maps.json.

nodes.label: Update Honkai Star Rail Warp Calendar
nodes.rationale: Weekly scrape of HSR warp banners from Game8 into data/honkai-star-rail/banners.json.
nodes.norm_label: update honkai star rail warp calendar

nodes.label: Update Honkai Star Rail Character Builds
nodes.rationale: Weekly scrape of HSR character builds from Game8 into data/honkai-star-rail/builds.json.
nodes.norm_label: update honkai star rail character builds

nodes.label: Update Honkai Star Rail Event Calendar
nodes.rationale: Runs daily because events rotate fast; scrapes HSR events from Game8 into data/honkai-star-rail/events.json.
nodes.norm_label: update honkai star rail event calendar

nodes.label: Update Honkai Star Rail Meta Teams
nodes.rationale: Weekly scrape of HSR meta team comps from Game8 into data/honkai-star-rail/teams.json.
nodes.norm_label: update honkai star rail meta teams

nodes.label: Update Honkai Star Rail Tier List
nodes.rationale: Weekly rebuild of the HSR tier list into data/honkai-star-rail.
nodes.norm_label: update honkai star rail tier list

nodes.label: Update Marvel Snap Cards
nodes.rationale: Daily scrape of Marvel Snap cards and codes from Marvel Snap Zone into data/marvel-snap/cards.json and data/codes/marvel-snap.json.

nodes.label: Update Game News
nodes.rationale: Runs every 6 hours; fetches news, refreshes redemption codes (DDV wiki + Epic Seven) and Outlast Trials trials/maps into data/news, data/codes, data/outlast-trials.

nodes.label: Update Neverness to Everness Teams
nodes.rationale: Weekly scrape of NTE player-tested team comps from Prydwen into data/nte.

nodes.label: News Article Page
nodes.rationale: Renders a single news item from data/news/<game>.json (full body when available, otherwise OG summary); headlines via Google News with source credit and link-out.

nodes.label: Cyberpunk 2077 Meta Builds
nodes.rationale: Build tool recreates the game's own UI (circuit-style perk tree + 10-slot cyberware body diagram) so a build is impossible to misread; build data hand-written.

nodes.label: Cyberpunk 2077 Game Page
nodes.rationale: Per-game landing page; hero and tool grid rendered from central data.js config via game.js.

nodes.label: Demon Reference
nodes.rationale: Lists every demon with its three-evidence combo plus strength/weakness; filter by evidence or search; data auto-scraped from the Demonologist Wiki.

nodes.label: Equipment Guide
nodes.rationale: Lists every tool and which of the 7 evidence types it finds (evidence tools first); data auto-scraped from the Demonologist Wiki.

nodes.label: Demon Evidence Checker
nodes.rationale: Interactive: click evidence once to mark found, twice to rule out; possible demons narrow live; 3 evidence per demon, data from the Demonologist Wiki.

nodes.label: NightmareFTW Gaming Tools Hub
nodes.author: NightmareFTW
nodes.rationale: Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS static hub hosted on GitHub Pages, no build step or framework; config-driven by data.js (one-file change to add a game/tool); two recurring themes are build tools that recreate the game's own UI and live sourced data over hand-typed lists refreshed by scheduled GitHub Actions; codes are hand-curated because auto-scraping proved too noisy.

nodes.label: data.js Central Config
nodes.rationale: Single central config file (assets/js/data.js) drives the game grid and each game's tool list; adding a game or tool is a one-file change.

nodes.label: Demonologist (game hub)
nodes.rationale: Data-driven hub page: game hero and tool grid rendered from shared data.js/game.js

nodes.label: DDV Animal Guide
nodes.rationale: Collection tracker for wild critters and companions; ticks saved on-device, filterable by DLC

nodes.label: DDV Friendship Tracker
nodes.rationale: Per-villager 0-10 friendship progress saved on-device; filter by DLC and assigned activity

nodes.label: DDV Items Database
nodes.rationale: Categorised item catalogue mirroring the in-game collection; search/filter/sort by sell and energy

nodes.label: DDV Recipe Browser
nodes.rationale: Search by recipe/ingredient, filter by star level, sort by sell/energy

nodes.label: DDV Star Path Tracker
nodes.rationale: Seasonal duty checklist with clear steps; list refreshed each new Star Path season

nodes.label: Elden Ring Meta Builds
nodes.rationale: Hand-written level-150 meta builds (equipment, attribute spread, Ash of War); item icons via community API

nodes.label: Elden Ring Missables Checklist
nodes.rationale: Tracks permanently-missable NPC questlines and world-state triggers; ticks saved on-device

nodes.label: Epic Seven Damage / EHP Calculator
nodes.rationale: Implements Epic Seven defense formula (damage taken = 300/(300+DEF)) and EHP = HP x (1 + DEF/300)

nodes.label: Epic Seven Gear Score Calculator
nodes.rationale: Grades gear via common community weighting (Speed x2, Crit Chance x1.6, Crit Dmg x1.14); a heuristic, not an in-game stat

nodes.label: Epic Seven Speed Tuning / Turn Order
nodes.rationale: Simulates opening turn order from unit Speed and starting CR; models natural rotation without CR-push/pull skills
nodes.norm_label: epic seven speed tuning / turn order

nodes.label: Expedition 33 Meta Builds
nodes.rationale: Five end-game team builds laid out like the in-game build screen (weapon, skills, Pictos, Luminas, attributes); hand-written

nodes.label: Expedition 33 Missables Checklist
nodes.rationale: Tracks genuinely-missable moments and points of no return; ticks saved on-device

nodes.label: Far Far West Meta Builds
nodes.rationale: Community loadouts grouped by primary weapon, auto-scraped from wikily.gg and ordered by net votes

nodes.label: Far Far West Maps & Collectibles
nodes.rationale: Per-region interactive maps with toggleable POI legend; data auto-scraped from wikily.gg, bulk pickups hidden by default

nodes.label: God of War Ragnarök Meta Builds
nodes.norm_label: god of war ragnarok meta builds

nodes.label: God of War Ragnarök Missables Checklist
nodes.norm_label: god of war ragnarok missables checklist

nodes.label: Honkai Star Rail Daily / Weekly Checklist
nodes.norm_label: honkai star rail daily / weekly checklist

nodes.label: Neverness to Everness Bond Gift Planner
nodes.norm_label: neverness to everness bond gift planner

nodes.label: Tier List & Builds (Neverness to Everness)
nodes.rationale: Character rankings & builds compiled from Game8, updating as the meta shifts.

nodes.label: Recommended Builds (The Outlast Trials)
nodes.rationale: A starting point, not gospel — swap amps to taste; meta loadouts per role.

nodes.label: Loadout Composition (1 Rig + 1 Tool + 1 Skill + 1 Medicine amp)
nodes.rationale: A real loadout is 1 Rig plus one amp from each of the Tool, Skill and Medicine groups.
nodes.norm_label: loadout composition (1 rig + 1 tool + 1 skill + 1 medicine amp)

nodes.label: The Outlast Trials Game Hub
nodes.rationale: Per-game landing page rendering a hero + tool grid from shared data.js/game.js.

nodes.label: Loadout Builder (The Outlast Trials)
nodes.rationale: Pick a rig + one amp per group, name it, save and share your own build.

nodes.label: Ghost Evidence Checker (Phasmophobia)
nodes.rationale: Click evidence to mark found or rule out; possible ghosts narrow down live (3 evidence per ghost).

nodes.label: Phasmophobia Game Hub
nodes.rationale: Per-game landing page rendering a hero + tool grid from shared data.js/game.js.

nodes.label: Cycle Timers (Warframe)
nodes.rationale: Live day/night and warm/cold cycles; countdown every second, API refresh every minute.

nodes.label: Warframe Game Hub
nodes.rationale: Per-game landing page rendering a hero + tool grid from shared data.js/game.js.

nodes.label: Worldstate Tracker (Warframe)
nodes.rationale: Live Sortie, Arbitration, Baro Ki'Teer and Void Fissures on PC platform; auto-refresh.

nodes.label: NightmareFTW Gaming Tools Hub Homepage
nodes.rationale: A growing toolbox of calculators, checklists and trackers; nothing gets removed, it just keeps growing. Games list with search, sort, view toggle and pinning.

nodes.label: Play / Arcade Landing
nodes.rationale: Small original browser games — no install, no account; sign in to sync progress across devices.

nodes.label: Murdoku Game Page
nodes.rationale: Original logic-deduction puzzle on a store map (part Sudoku, part detective); endless cases, progress saved locally and synced when signed in.

hyperedges.label: Scheduled scrape-and-commit workflow pattern
hyperedges.rationale: All auto-update workflows share the same scaffold: cron schedule + workflow_dispatch, contents:write permission, checkout + setup-node@20, run a scripts/update-*.js scraper, then commit-and-push only if data/ changed.
